title: Junior German Speaking IT Support Specialist

summary.lv: Atea Global Services meklē jaunāko IT atbalsta speciālistu ar vācu valodas prasmēm (B2+), kurš apkalpotu klientu pieprasījumus un incidentus Servicedesk komandā Rīgā.
summary.en: Atea Global Services is looking for a Junior IT Support Specialist with German language skills (B2+) to handle customer incidents and requests in their Servicedesk team in Riga.
